MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Jason Rothman, Esq. 310-438-5555 Bibiyan Law Group for Plaintiff.
Andrew McNaught, Esq. 415-544-1022 for Defendant.
Court reporter: Mary Ann Scanlan, CSR #8875, 415-834-1114, ma@scanlanstone.com

ARGUED.Mr. McNaught sent a timely notice to contest and presents arguments that the court's tentative ruling did not take judicial notice of Plaintiff's severance agreement. Mr. Rothman responds. After full argument, the Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT MAXIMUS REAL ESTATE PARTNERS, LTD.'s DEMURRER to COMPLAINT.

Defendants Demurrer to Complaint.

Taken Under Submission.***
